meaning: adj.甜酒的,奇妙的,危险的n.酒鬼,拉米纸牌戏(基本玩法是组成三四张同点的套牌或不少于三张的同花顺)
examples: This team managed to complete one round of Rummy in 20 minutes.
"I'd rather surround myself with sharp young minds than play golf and gin rummy all day, " he says.
Nostalgia pervades Parsi clubs, where elderly ladies play rummy in faded English dresses.
You let winners run and discard laggards like you were playing gin rummy.
